creator: gbe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Stefan Schlosser from comment #3)
No, you don't have to resubmit your patches. I'll commit them once approved with your real name and e-mail address provided. For this PR I am still waiting for an approval by @imp, because there are some ls(1) updates including the manual page, that aren't in stable/14 or stable/13. Once I have the approval the MFC these changes first, I can MFC your patch to stable branches and close the PR.

Besides this, thanks for the patches.
